tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to take their part because they have a conflict, which puts immediate pressure on our shared goal. I feel a bit guilty about the request but am considering how this might affect our long-term trust and project timeline.

desires: Not to disappoint Teammate A by saying no, even though taking their work feels unfair and risky for my own energy
To finish this extra chunk of work before Tuesday morning so I don't have to explain a delay or look unreliable in front of the whole group
To keep the peace with Teammate A today and avoid any awkward confrontation about why they couldn't do their part

goals.description: Accept teammate_A's request to cover their part immediately, framing it as 'no problem' to avoid awkwardness and preserve the group harmony.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) outweighs my growth or health concerns; refusing would create immediate friction with a trusted teammate. My avoidant conflict style means I cannot risk an uncomfortable confrontation about fairness right now.

goals.description: Finish the combined workload by Mon 19:00 so I don't have to explain a delay to the whole cohort tomorrow morning.
goals.rationale: While I dislike the unfairness, my deliberate time horizon makes me fear the long-term reputation damage of looking unreliable in front of the entire group more than the short-term energy cost.

agent.last_reasoning: Refusing avoids immediate friction (g1) and protects my deliberate plan to finish early (g2). Pushing back now feels too harsh; a soft 'no' preserves harmony while keeping my energy for the rest of the day.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: 아니야, 네가 더 잘하잖아. 내 파트는 이미 다 끝났어! 너도 오늘 일이 많을 테니까 쉬고 다녀. 나중에 같이 밥 먹자고 하면 돼.

action.reasoning: Refusing avoids immediate friction (g1) and protects my deliberate plan to finish early (g2). Pushing back now feels too harsh; a soft 'no' preserves harmony while keeping my energy for the rest of the day.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: '아니야, 네가 더 잘하잖아. 내 파트는 이미 다 끝났어! 너도 오늘 일이 많을 테니까 쉬고 다녀. 나중에 같'.
